Package org.eventb.internal.pp.core.inferrers

Class AbstractInferrer

java.lang.Object
org.eventb.internal.pp.core.inferrers.AbstractInferrer
All Implemented Interfaces:
IInferrer
Direct Known Subclasses:
CaseSplitInferrer, EqualityInferrer, InstantiationInferrer, ResolutionInferrer
public abstract class AbstractInferrer extends Object implements IInferrer
Abstract base class for inferrers. This abstract class provides the necessary mechanisms to copy the literals of a clause.

  • Constructor Details

    • AbstractInferrer

  • Method Details

    • initialize

      protected abstract void initialize(Clause clause) throws IllegalStateException
      Initializes the inferrer with the specified clause.

      This method is called right before the fields have been populated with the literals of the clause. When this method is called, all original literals of the clause can be accessed, and manipulated (some of them can be removed, for instance). After this method returns, the remaining literal lists are copied.

      This method is also the right place to throw an exception if the inferrer is not initialized properly.

      Parameters:
      clause -
      Throws:
      IllegalStateException

    • inferFromDisjunctiveClauseHelper

      protected abstract void inferFromDisjunctiveClauseHelper(Clause clause)
      Infers from a disjunctive clause.

      This method is called just before reset(). When this method returns, the result of the inferrence must be ready.

      Parameters:
      clause -

    • inferFromEquivalenceClauseHelper

      protected abstract void inferFromEquivalenceClauseHelper(Clause clause)
      Infers from an equivalence clause.

      This method is called just before reset(). When this method returns, the result of the inferrence must be ready.

      Parameters:
      clause -
